list.name: Truma Aventa eco + soft start — product page
description: Manufacturer page for the 13,500 BTU/h rooftop air conditioner installed in this van, with the SoftStartRV module pre-installed to reduce start-up amp draw on inverter power.

list.name: Truma Aventa eco / comfort — operating instructions
description: Full operating instructions for the Aventa eco unit, including the automatic, manual, and dehumidification fan modes shown on the touchscreen.

list.name: Truma CP plus — product page
description: Manufacturer page for the physical control panel that drives the thermostat loop using its own CP plus temperature sensor, independent of the Garmin display.

list.name: Truma CP plus — operating instructions
description: Covers the rotary push-button menu and the ACC (Automatic Climate Control) setting, which must be ON for the Garmin panel to be able to issue temperature commands to the Truma system.
